recommendations.title: Botched
recommendations.overview: Ritchie Donovan is a professional thief whose luck has just run out. The only survivor from a heist that goes terribly wrong, Ritchie is forced to take the rap and is sent to Russia to steal a priceless antique cross locked in a safe on the penthouse

recommendations.title: Lying and Stealing
recommendations.overview: Hoping to leave his criminal lifestyle behind him, a successful art thief teams up with a sexy con woman to pull off the ultimate heist and set himself free.

recommendations.title: Masquerade
recommendations.overview: A young girl struggles to survive after a group of home invaders break into her house to steal her family's priceless artwork.

recommendations.title: Fear Clinic
recommendations.overview: A doctor works to cure patients suffering from crippling phobias by placing them inside his invention which induces and controls hallucinations.

recommendations.title: Dhoom 2
recommendations.overview: Jai and Ali return, this time on the trail of an international thief who steals priceless artifacts and has chosen Mumbai as his next target.

recommendations.title: The Big Fake
recommendations.overview: Toni Chichiarelli arrives in Rome with the dream of becoming a painter, but his talent leads him elsewhere — from art galleries to state secrets. Between art, crime, and power, his signature ends up everywhere — even in the history of Italy.

recommendations.title: The Getaway
recommendations.overview: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

recommendations.title: Dracula 2000
recommendations.overview: When a team of techno-savvy thieves break into a high-security vault, they don't discover priceless works of art... they find a crypt unopened for 100 years.

recommendations.title: The Lighthouse
recommendations.overview: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

recommendations.title: The Mastermind
recommendations.overview: In a sedate Massachusetts suburb circa 1970, unemployed family man and amateur art thief J.B. Mooney sets out on his first heist. With the museum cased and accomplices recruited, he has an airtight plan. Or so he thinks.
